pqr_criteria.criteria: Scope of Work: Vendor must Design, Engineer, Supply, Install, Test, and Commission the complete Chiller-Based Air Dehumidification system.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Water Cooled Chillers: Must supply 2 units, each with 300 TR capacity.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Compressor Type: Must be Screw Compressors.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Refrigerant: Must use R-134a. The first charge of refrigerant and oil must be included.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Heat Exchangers: Both Shell & Tube evaporator and condenser must have SS 304 tubes.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower: Must supply 1 unit with circulation flow rate sufficient for a 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower Design: Must be induced draft type with FRP basin, casing, and louvers, and a PVC fill/eliminator.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower Fan: Must be an axial fan equipped with a VFD.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower Dosing System: A chemical dosing system for the cooling tower must be included.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Air Handling Unit (AHU): Must supply 1 double skin unit with a supply air fan capacity of 53000 CFM.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU Performance: Must achieve an outlet air temperature of 22 +/- 2 °C and relative humidity of 45 +/- 2%.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU Components: Must include a pre-filter section (10-micron), a plug fan with VFD, and PVC droplet eliminators.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU Materials: Drain pan, cooling coil tubes, casing, and header must be SS 304. Fins must be plain aluminum.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pumps (Chilled & Condenser Water): Must supply 3 units of each (2 Working + 1 Standby) suitable for a 600 TR load.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump Motor: Motors must be IE-3 efficiency class, TEFC, square cage induction, with Class F insulation.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump Materials: Casing must be Cast Iron, Impeller must be SS, and Shaft must be EN8.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Design Load Distinction: Chillers and pumps must be designed for 600 TR, while the AHU, Cooling Tower, and main piping headers must be designed for 760 TR.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Site Power Supply: System must be designed for a 415 V +/- 10%, 50 Hz, 3 Phase, 4 Wire power supply.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Design Ambient Conditions: System must be designed for an ambient air temperature of 35 °C and 57% humidity.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower Thermal Design: Must be designed for a wet bulb temperature of 29 °C and a cooling tower outlet temperature of 33 °C.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Water Quality: Equipment must be designed to operate with the specified water quality parameters (TDS < 150 ppm, Chlorides < 30 ppm, etc.).
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Civil Works Scope: Vendor must construct a PEB shed for the chiller and AHU, and foundations for pumps and the cooling tower.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: PEB Shed Design: The shed must provide space for 2 working chillers plus one future spare chiller. Foundations are only required for the 2 working chillers.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Commissioning Scope: Vendor must perform pre-commissioning (Hydrotest, Pneumatic test, DOR check, no-load run), commissioning, start-up, and a Guaranteed Test Run (GTR) with signoff.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved Make for Chillers: Must be Kirloskar, Kehem’s, or Train.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved Make for Cooling Towers: Must be from Advance cooling towers, Paharpur, Encon, Thermal care, or M square.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved Make for AHUs: Must be from Edgetech, Citizen, Zeco, or System Air.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved Make for Pumps: Must be from KSB, SULZER, KIRLOSKAR, WILO, WILFLEY, or GRUNDFOS.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved Make for Motors: Must be from CGL, BBL, Siemens, or ABB.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved Make for PLC: Must be Allen Bradley, Honeywell, or Schneider.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Engineering Deliverables: Vendor must provide a comprehensive set of engineering documents, including P&IDs, equipment layouts, GA drawings, and specifications for piping, electrical, and instrumentation.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Spares Requirement: Vendor must supply commissioning spares and provide a list of recommended spares for 2 years of maintenance.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cost Breakdown: Bidders must submit a detailed cost breakdown for Engineering, Supply (Mechanical, Electrical, Instrument, Spares, Civil), Construction (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrument), and Commissioning.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: O&M Cost: Vendor must provide a separate cost for a 1-year Operation and Maintenance service contract.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Project Site Location: The project site is located at Plot- K1, Taloja MIDC Road, MH 410208.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Project Type: The project is a Brownfield project at an existing facility.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Area Classification: The equipment and installation must be suitable for a Safe, dust-free, and non-hazardous area, with the consideration of ammonia present in the atmosphere.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General
